# CompuX

> CompuX is an AI compute credit marketplace and financing platform.
> $1M in financing → $1.25-1.5M in compute credits (25-50% multiplier).
> OpenAI-compatible API. Drop-in replacement. Multi-provider routing.
> Three-sided marketplace: AI Startups + Compute Providers + Capital Partners.
> Layer 5 (Token Operator) in the AI compute value chain.

## Website
- https://compux.net

## API Documentation
- [Quickstart](https://compux.net/api/quickstart/): Get running with the CompuX API in 5 minutes. Python, TypeScript, Go, cURL examples. Drop-in OpenAI replacement.
- [API Reference](https://compux.net/api/api-reference/): Full endpoint documentation — chat completions, embeddings, models, account/credits, account/usage. Request/response schemas.
- [Available Models](https://compux.net/api/models/): 100+ models across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, Meta, DeepSeek. Pricing tables, feature matrix, selection guide.
- [Authentication](https://compux.net/api/authentication/): API key management — production vs sandbox keys, scopes, IP allowlisting, key rotation, budget limits.
- [Error Handling](https://compux.net/api/errors/): HTTP status codes, structured error responses, retry strategies with exponential backoff. Python and TypeScript examples.
- [Rate Limits](https://compux.net/api/rate-limits/): RPM and TPM limits by plan tier. Sliding window, rate limit headers, proactive throttling patterns.
- [Pricing](https://compux.net/api/pricing/): Plans from Free to Enterprise. Credit-based pricing, financing multipliers (1.25-1.50x), cost calculator, billing details.

## Code Examples
- [quickstart.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/quickstart.py): Basic Python chat completion with CompuX API.
- [quickstart.ts](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/quickstart.ts): TypeScript chat, streaming, and multi-model comparison.
- [streaming.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/streaming.py): Real-time SSE token streaming in Python.
- [error_handling.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/error_handling.py): Production retry logic with exponential backoff.
- [async_client.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/async_client.py): Async batch processing with concurrency control.
- [function_calling.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/function_calling.py): Tool use / function calling with CompuX.
- [langchain_integration.py](https://github.com/CompuX-ai/compute-credit-financing/blob/main/examples/langchain_integration.py): LangChain + CompuX as LLM backend.
